m5_severity_match.note: Matched rows with non-empty GT rationale_if_no vs confidence tiers.

m6_gsop_coverage.note: Mean Jaccard on matched rows; GT side empty if CSV has no gsop_codes.

missed_subcats: Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 1 [Participants aged 18 years or older (or the minimum age of consent in accordance with local regulations) at screening. Reproductive criteria for male and female participants ]

Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 2 [Histological or cytological diagnosis of A/MBC; >=1% ER+ stained cells on the most recent tumor biopsy and HER2-neg tumor by IHC or ISH per ASCO/CAP. Tumor tissue collection required.]

Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 3 [Prior anticancer therapies: up to 2 lines in A/M setting; 1 line CDK4/6i is required, in any setting. Prior CDK4/6i stopped due to AE: not eligible; dose reductions due to AE: refer to protocol.]

Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 4 [Participants must have >=1 measurable lesion per RECIST v1.1. Participants with ONLY bone lesions are elegible if >=1 bone lesion has a measurable component per RECIST v1.1.]
Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 5 [ECOG PS ≤ 1.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 1 [Visceral crisis at risk of life-threatening complications in the short term, including: massive uncontrolled effusions, pulmonary lymphangitis, and liver involvement >50%.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 10 [Concurrent administration of medications, food, or herb supplements as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 11 [Renal impairment as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 13 [Hematologic abnormalities as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 14 [Known active infection including HBV, HCV, HIV or AIDS-related illness and SARS-CoV-2 infection as defined in protocol.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 15 [Site staff members involved in the study conduct and their family, site staff supervised by the investigator, sponsor and sponsor delegate involved in the study conduct and their family.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 2 [Known history of drug- induced pneumonitis or other significant symptomatic deterioration of lung functions.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 3 [Newly diagnosed/symptomatic CNS mets, carcinomatous meningitis, or leptomeningeal disease, cerebral edema, and/or progressive growth. Refer to protocol for the details.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 4 [Refractory nausea/vomiting, chronic GI disease, GI ulcer or bleeding- inability to swallow formulated product, or prior gastric bowel resection precluding adequate absorption of study intervention.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 5 [History of any other tumor malignancies within the past 3 years as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 6 [Impaired cardiovascular function or clinically significant cardiovascular diseases as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 7 [Prior procedures and treatment including major surgery, radiotherapy, other studies as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 8 [Any unresolved toxicities from prior surgeries or therapies or other toxicities as per protocol .]
Subject met exclusion criteria 9 [Other medical or psychiatric condition or laboratory abnormalities that may increase the risk of study participation as defined in protocol.]
hallucinated_subcats: Participant did not meet disease characteristics inclusion criteria (e.g., ER+/HER2- A/MBC, measurable lesions) but was enrolled to the study treatment
Participant did not meet prior therapy inclusion criteria (e.g., prior CDK4/6 inhibitor, lines of therapy) but was enrolled to the study treatment
Participant met cardiovascular exclusion criteria (e.g., QTcF prolongation, recent myocardial infarction, symptomatic heart failure) but was enrolled to the study treatment
Participant met concurrent condition exclusion criteria (e.g., active infection, brain metastases, visceral crisis) but was enrolled to the study treatment
Participant met prohibited medication exclusion criteria (e.g., strong CYP3A inhibitors/inducers) but was enrolled to the study treatment

missed_subcats: Blind compromised
Dosing/Administration error: overdose.
hallucinated_subcats: Dispensing error
IP accountability not done
Storage error/temperature excursion. IP administered to participant without Sponsor approval
Study drug not held despite AE that required dose to be held per protocol
Study drug not reduced as per protocol (e.g., Ribociclib not reduced to 400 mg or 200 mg for toxicity)
Subject received wrong treatment (e.g., wrong dose of ARV-471 or Ribociclib)
Mandatory concomitant medication (e.g., GnRH or LHRH agonist for men and pre-/peri-menopausal participants) not taken or not administered as specified per protocol
Participant received prohibited concurrent anticancer therapy (e.g., chemotherapy, radiotherapy, or other endocrine therapies) during the study treatment period
Participant took a prohibited concomitant medication (e.g., strong or moderate CYP3A inhibitors/inducers, or drugs known to predispose to Torsade de Pointes or QT interval prolongation)
Biomarker samples (e.g., ctDNA, tumor tissue) not collected per protocol
Clinical laboratory assessments (e.g., hematology, blood chemistry) not done
Clinical laboratory results were not reviewed by an Investigator in a timely manner
PK or biomarker samples not properly collected, stored or handled
PK samples for ARV-471, ARV-473, or ribociclib not done
Pregnancy test not done or done out of visit window prior to dosing with ARV-471 or ribociclib
ARV-471 Lead-In Period visit (Day -7 or Day -1) conducted outside the protocol-specified window
Cycle 1 Day 8 or Day 15 visit conducted outside the protocol-specified window
Screening visit conducted outside the protocol-specified window of ≤ 28 days prior to first dose
Study visit conducted outside the protocol-specified visit window
Visit not done
Visit not performed per protocol
Abnormal procedure/test result (e.g., laboratory abnormality, ECG finding) not followed up per protocol
Disease assessment (CT/MRI of chest, abdomen, pelvis, or bone scan) not done or incomplete
Pharmacokinetic (PK) blood samples for ARV-471, ARV-473, or ribociclib not collected
Procedures for contraception counseling or contraception checks for WOCBP and males not followed
Radiographic imaging (CT/MRI or bone scan) was performed but could not be utilized for RECIST v1.1 tumor assessment
Triplicate 12-lead ECGs not performed per protocol

missed_subcats: Randomized under wrong stratification
hallucinated_subcats: Participant allocated to the study via IRT but did not receive any study intervention (ARV-471 or ribociclib)
Participant didn't receive the drugs they were randomized to (e.g., received incorrect dose level of ARV-471 or ribociclib compared to IRT allocation)
Participant randomized in IRT in error (e.g., system error or site error resulting in unintended allocation to ARV-471 and ribociclib)
Participant randomized out of protocol defined window (e.g., >28 days after screening assessments without re-screening)
Adverse events (AEs) or serious adverse events (SAEs) were not recorded in the clinical database
Dose-limiting toxicity (DLT) occurring during the Cycle 1 DLT observation period was not reported to the Sponsor within the specified timeframe
SAE Not reported by investigator to Ethics Committee / IRB per local regulations
Participant initiated prohibited subsequent anticancer therapy but was not discontinued from study intervention.
Participant met protocol-specified criteria for permanent discontinuation of study intervention (e.g., objective tumor progression per RECIST v1.1, unacceptable toxicity) but was not discontinued.
Participant required a dose interruption of ARV-471 or ribociclib exceeding the protocol-allowed maximum duration but was not permanently discontinued.
Participant was permanently discontinued from study intervention but did not meet any protocol-specified discontinuation criteria.
Other potentially important protocol deviation not categorized elsewhere
Participant confidentiality compromised

missed_subcats: ICD not signed by impartial witness, when applicable
ICD was lost, copy available
Subject/LAR did not sign the ICD but gave verbal consent
Subject/LAR signed and dated ICD after screen/enroll date

near_misses.generated_text: Participant met hepatic, renal, or hematologic dysfunction exclusion criteria but was enrolled to the study treatment
near_misses.gt_text: Subject met exclusion criteria 12 [Hepatic dysfunction as defined in protocol.]

near_misses.generated_text: Dosing/Administration error (e.g., Ribociclib taken continuously instead of 21 days on/7 days off)
Participant took a permitted concomitant medication, but not as specified per protocol
Clinical laboratory assessments (hematology, blood chemistry, pregnancy test) not performed or performed out of window
near_misses.gt_text: Baseline Tumor Assessment inadequate/not performed/out of protocol specified window.

near_misses.generated_text: SAE/EIU not reported to Sponsor within specified timeframe
Participant became pregnant during the study but was not discontinued from study intervention.
near_misses.gt_text: Participant developed withdrawal criteria during the study but was not withdrawn

near_misses.generated_text: Participant did not sign the additional consent for optional procedure(s) (e.g., Retained Research Sample for Genetics) but biologic samples were collected.
near_misses.gt_text: Subject did not sign the additional consent for optional procedure(s) but biologic samples were collected

near_misses.generated_text: Informed consent document signed by the participant had not received IRB/IEC approval for the TACTIVE-U study.
near_misses.gt_text: ICD signed by subject/LAR had not received IRB/IEC approval

near_misses.generated_text: Participant signed the informed consent document after study-specified screening procedures (e.g., tumor biopsy, PK blood samples) had already been performed.
near_misses.gt_text: Subject signed ICD after study-specified procedures had been performed

near_misses.generated_text: Informed consent document was signed by unauthorized site personnel instead of the designated investigator for the TACTIVE-U study.
near_misses.gt_text: ICD signed by unauthorized site personnel

near_misses.generated_text: Participant did not sign the informed consent document and did not give verbal consent prior to receiving ARV-471 or Ribociclib or undergoing study procedures.
near_misses.gt_text: Subject/LAR did not sign ICD & did not give verbal consent

near_misses.generated_text: Informed consent document was not translated to the participant's native language, impairing their understanding of the ARV-471 and Ribociclib study.
near_misses.gt_text: ICD not translated to subject's/LAR native language

near_misses.generated_text: The signed informed consent document was lost and no copy is available to verify consent for participation in the study.
near_misses.gt_text: ICD was lost, no copy available
